tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Joe Root is one of England's greatest modern batsmen and has been a key player in all formats of cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Root has scored more than 10,000 Test runs and captained England in Test cricket for several years.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He was a major part of England's batting lineup during their successful international campaigns.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ben Stokes is one of the best all rounders in modern cricket and known for his match winning performances.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He played a crucial role in England winning the 2019 ICC Cricket World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Stokes is famous for his incredible innings in the 2019 Ashes Test at Headingley.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: James Anderson is one of the greatest swing bowlers in cricket history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He became the first fast bowler to take more than 600 Test wickets.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Anderson has played international cricket for more than two decades.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Jos Buttler is known for his explosive batting in limited overs cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He captained England in white ball formats and helped them win major tournaments.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Buttler is famous for playing innovative shots like the reverse sweep and ramp shots.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Stuart Broad was one of England's most successful fast bowlers in Test cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Broad took more than 600 Test wickets during his career.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He once took 8 wickets for 15 runs in an Ashes Test match.
